extracted_json.title: HW #1, Prob. #1 — Preliminary Instructions

blocks.text: Pre-liminary instructions (for all the work - homeworks, exams, project tasks - done in TIM 172A/P and beyond.):

items.text: Create a simple plan (what, when, how long, .....) for doing all the problems in an assigment
Download the SPSP handout on Canvas
For every problem, "copy-and-paste" the handout into your proposed solution
Decide which sub-steps (for each of the 5 primary steps) are relevant or necessary to the solution of your particular problem
⇒ Customize the SPSP for your particular problem.

extracted_json.summary_topic_line: Preliminary instructions for homework, exams, and project tasks in TIM 172A/P.
extracted_json.summary_gist: Two preliminary habits to develop for all course work: (1) a planning habit—create a simple plan (what, when, how long) for doing all problems in an assignment; and (2) a structured problem-solving habit—download the SPSP handout from Canvas, copy-and-paste it into each proposed solution, and decide which sub-steps of the 5 primary steps are relevant, customizing the SPSP for each particular problem.

transcription:
2.    HW # 1,  Prob. # 1

Pre-liminary instructions ( for all the work
   - homeworks, exams, project tasks - done in
   TIM 172A/P  and beyond.) :

  1. Develop a planning (habit)
            - Create a simple plan (what, when,
              how long, .....) for doing all the
              problems in an assigment

  2. Develop a structured problem -solving (habit.)
            - Download the SPSP handout on Canvas
            - For every problem, "copy-and-paste"
              the handout into your proposed solution
            - Decide which sub- steps ( for each
              of the 5 primary steps) are relevant
              or necessary to the solution of your
              particular problem
                 ⇒ Customize the SPSP for
                    your particular problem.
